I am from São Paulo.
My flight is at seven o'clock.
I live in Vila Leopoldina.
I travel to Europe once in a while.
Excuse me, is this seat free? They just announced a two-hour delay on the Paris flight.
Yes, please. Two hours! Well, we have time. I am Rosângela.
Nice to meet you, Rosângela. I am Daniel. Where are you from?
I am from São Paulo, in Brazil. I live in Vila Leopoldina. And you?
I am from Chicago. I am a photographer, and I travel for work. This is my third trip to Paris this year.
Three times in one year! I travel to Europe once in a while, with my husband. My destination is Paris too.
Then we are on the same plane. Do you have your boarding pass? They changed the gate. It is B14 now.
Oh, thank you! It is here, in my carry-on. Gate B14. I understand now.
Hello. I am Rosângela. I am from São Paulo.
Here is my passport and my boarding pass.
I am going to Paris. My flight is at seven o'clock.
Excuse me, which gate is my flight?
Sorry, I do not understand. Can you repeat, please?

Good evening, ladies and gentlemen. This is an announcement for the passengers of flight 447 to Paris. We are sorry to tell you that your flight is delayed. The new departure time is nine o'clock, so there is a delay of two hours. We apologize for the delay and for the inconvenience. There is also a gate change. Flight 447 to Paris now leaves from gate B14, here in Terminal 3. Please go to gate B14 with your boarding pass and your passport. Boarding starts at eight thirty. Once again: flight 447 to Paris, new departure time nine o'clock, gate B14, Terminal 3. Thank you very much for your patience.

Hello. My name is Laura, and I am waiting for the Paris flight too. I am from Portugal. I live in Lisbon, near the river. I am 62 years old, and I am retired now. I travel once in a while, always with my sister. She is here too, at the coffee shop. This year we are going to Paris for one week. We love museums, and we walk everywhere, all day. My flight is at nine o'clock, from Terminal 3, and my gate is B14. The same as you, I think. My passport and my boarding pass are here, in my carry-on. Two hours of delay is a long time, but I am not in a hurry. So, tell me about you. Where are you from?
